module.name: line
module.description: Draws a straight line across a rectangular box. Pick where the line starts and ends (any corner or edge-midpoint of the box), the end-cap shapes (arrow, triangle, dot, circle, diamond, square, bar, ...), the line style (solid / dashed / dotted), colour, thickness and box size.
module.aiSpec:
Draw a straight LINE across a rectangular box (e.g. a divider, connector or annotation). Inline module — no body. The line runs between a START and an END anchor, each chosen from the box's 8 edge points: corners `tl tr bl br` and edge-midpoints `tc`(top) `bc`(bottom) `lc`(left) `rc`(right). Defaults `lc`->`rc` (a horizontal line through the centre); `tc`->`bc` is vertical; corner->corner is diagonal.
Parameters: - `start` / `end`: the two anchors (see the 8 points above). - `startshape` / `endshape`: end-cap shape — none, arrow, arrow-open, triangle, dot, circle, round, square, diamond, bar. Default start none, end arrow. - `linestyle`: solid (default), dashed, dotted, dashdot. - `color`: any CSS colour; blank = the theme text colour. - `thickness`: line width in px (0.5-20, default 2). - `width` / `height`: CSS lengths sizing the box (defaults 100% and 60px). - `opacity`: line opacity 0-1 (default 1). - `capscale`: multiplier on the end-cap size (0.3-4, default 1). - `align` (left|center|right, default left): horizontal placement when width < 100%.
Example: <!-- @line start: lc, end: rc, endshape: arrow, color: #ef4444, opacity: 0.8 -->

param.name: color
param.label: Colour
param.desc: Blank uses the theme text colour.

param.name: height
param.label: Box height
param.desc: CSS length (e.g. 60px, 6em). Gives diagonal/vertical lines room.

param.name: capscale
param.label: Cap size
param.desc: Multiplier on the end-cap marker size.

param.name: align
param.label: Align
param.desc: Horizontal placement of the box when width is under 100%.

snippet.label: Line — arrow
snippet.text: <!-- @line start: lc, end: rc, endshape: arrow -->
snippet.description: A horizontal arrow across the box (left to right).

snippet.label: Line — double-headed diagonal
snippet.text: <!-- @line start: bl, end: tr, startshape: dot, endshape: arrow, linestyle: dashed, color: #3b82f6 -->
snippet.description: A dashed diagonal line with a dot start and arrow end.
